# Total Coliforms

**Summary**: A group of bacteria used as indicators for fecal contamination.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-yusuf|Yusuf, 2015]] monitored total-coliforms to assess the risk of pathogens in water.

## Scientific Context

- [[2015-yusuf|Yusuf, 2015]] Indicator of fecal pollution and water safety.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2015-yusuf|Yusuf, 2015]] Membrane filter technique on EMB agar.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Significant differences in TCC were observed between outfall locations and control sites. ([[2015-yusuf|Yusuf, 2015, p. 41]])
